use_case: transcribe support calls and summarize the action items

gaps.name: transcribe
gaps.why: No library specialist can turn a support-call recording into text; the pipeline needs a speech-to-text step before anything can be summarized.

gaps.name: summarize_action_items
gaps.why: No library specialist extracts and summarizes action items from a conversation transcript; write/respond are for drafting outbound messages, not distilling owners/tasks/next-steps from a call.
